recommendations.title: Freedom Writers
recommendations.overview: A young teacher inspires her class of at-risk students to learn tolerance, apply themselves, and pursue education beyond high school.

recommendations.title: P.S. I Love You
recommendations.overview: A young widow discovers that her late husband has left her 10 messages intended to help ease her pain and start a new life.

recommendations.title: The Last Five Years
recommendations.overview: In New York, a struggling actress and a successful writer sing about their failed marriage from two perspectives.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Creatures
recommendations.overview: Ethan Wate just wants to get to know Lena Duchannes better, but unbeknownst to him, Lena has strange powers.  As Lena's 16th birthday approaches she might decide her fate, to be good or evil.  A choice which will impact her relationship forever.

recommendations.title: Paris Je T'aime
recommendations.overview: Olivier Assayas, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven and Alfonso Cuaron are among the 20 distinguished directors who contribute to this collection of 18 stories, each exploring a different aspect of Parisian life. The colourful characters in this drama include
recommendations.director: Gurinder Chadha, Daniela Thomas, Joel Coen, Frédéric Auburtin, Gérard Depardieu, Nobuhiro Suwa, Richard LaGravenese, Bruno Podalydès, Vincenzo Natali, Walter Salles, Ethan Coen, Alfonso Cuarón, Alexander Payne, Tom Tykwer, Isabel Coixet, Oliver Schmitz, Christopher Doyle, Olivier Assayas, Sylvain Chomet, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven

recommendations.title: Love on the Sidelines
recommendations.overview: A down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with an injury. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Remember the Night
recommendations.overview: Unexpected love blossoms when an assistant district attorney agrees to take a recidivist shoplifter home so she doesn't have to spend Christmas alone in jail.

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: Dìdi (弟弟)
recommendations.overview: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love your mom.
